reviews.comment:

It's baffling that there's only one beach attendant at 8 pm, which is a waste of time.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Tanto al socio como al no socio del ACA. Baños siempre limpios. Oficina de atencion al socio. Muy lindo bar para compartir un café o un tostado durante el descanso del día o del viaje
Nunca tuve problemas con  el combustible que cargó allí, y lo hago semanalmente. 👍 Muy bien los empleados de playa

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention. Both members and non-members of the ACA. Always clean bathrooms. Member service office. Very nice bar to share a coffee or a toast during the break of the day or the trip
I've never had a problem with fueling there, and I do it weekly. 👍 Very good beach employees
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwNExUUXVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención de los empleados excelente, tanto en los surtidores como en el local full y las oficinas del Aca. Algo de lugar para estacionar, faltan másbaños y la limpieza de los mismos deja mucho que desear los de la parte de combustible. En el local de ypf full debería tener más variedad. Posee servicio de inflado de rueda gratuito y confortable. Agua caliente para termo. Boxes, grúas, mecánicos. Oficina municipal para obtener Carnet de conducir

(Translated by Google)
Excellent customer service, both at the pumps and in the full-service station and the ACA offices. There's some parking available, but more restrooms are needed, and the cleanliness of the existing restrooms in the fuel area leaves much to be desired. The full-service station should offer a wider variety of products. It has a free and convenient tire inflation service. Hot water for thermoses is available. There are service bays, tow trucks, and mechanics. A municipal office for obtaining a driver's license is also located there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVLThQTUdnEAE
